description: PR-mined: real upstream commit 85895f3 ('[fix] changes foreground service type to special use'). Switches the on-Android-14+ ServiceCompat.startForeground() call from FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SHORT_SERVICE to FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SPECIAL_USE, matching the manifest's specialUse declaration. behavioralMarker is null: both constants are javac-inlined ints (ServiceInfo.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_* are compile-time constants), so neither name survives into the recompiled class bytes -- same class of issue as the README's R-id-churn note, just via an SDK constant instead of an R field.
